message:
test(db): add unit tests for models.rs (24 tests) and error.rs (28 tests)

Cover all model helpers (ack_required_bool, is_exclusive, is_active,
created_at_naive, touch), error classification (is_retryable,
is_recoverable, error_code), lock/pool detection, serde roundtrips,
default value assertions, and Display formatting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
